question: (I) In an EM wave traveling west, the B field oscillates up and down vertically and has a frequency of 90.0 kHz and an rms strength of Determine the frequency and rms strength of the electric field. What is the direction of its oscillations? 7.75 * 10-9 T.
final_answer: 90.0 kHz, along the horizontal north-south line.
